# oh-my-claudecode

Multi-agent orchestration CLI for Claude Code. Adds /autopilot, /setup commands and workflow automation. npm: oh-my-claude-sisyphus

## Installation

```bash
/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
```

```bash
npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest
```

## Commands

- `/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode`
- `/plugin install oh-my-claudecode`
- `npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest`

## Usage Examples

- /autopilot "build a REST API for managing tasks"
- /setup - Initialize OMC in project
- omc setup - From terminal
